C/C FOR COURT TRIAL. ATTORNEY SCOTT M. RENNIE APPEARED FOR PLTF. S. F. HOUSING. DEFENDANT FLORENCE LANGE APPEARED IN PRO PER. PLTF'S. WITNESS, S/E. PLTF'S. EXHIBITS, I.D. AND EVID. THE COURT AFTER HEARING EVIDENCE AND REVIEWING EXHIBITS ORDERED JUDGMENT FOR PLAINTIFF AGAINST DEFT. FLORENCE LANGE FOR RESTITUTION OF THE PREMISE AND FOR MONEY JUDGMENT. SEE CLERK MINUTES FOR DETAILS. EXHIBITS WITHDRAWN. NO TESTIMONY WAS GIVEN BY DEFENDANT, FLORENCE LANGE.
STIPULATION AND ORDER TO SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT JUDGMENT OF JUN-27-1997 SET ASIDE
SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY: BLACKMAN, JOEL MARTIN SUBSTITUTED FOR RENNIE, SCOTT M. AS ATTORNEY FOR HOUSING AUTHORITY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A PUBLIC CORPORATION

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LANGE, FLORENCE DOES 1 TO 20, INCLUSIVE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 154 APPLETON STREET, SAN FRANCISCO, CALIFORNIA $870.23 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $870.23, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE JUDGMENT FOR DETAILS.
